problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
